# GlobalAI Inc. — Business Plan

## Executive Summary

GlobalAI is an AI-powered platform that will revolutionize the way humans interact with information. Using cutting-edge artificial intelligence and machine learning, we will disrupt the global enterprise software market. Our team has decades of combined experience and we are uniquely positioned to capture massive market share.

We are raising $50M to build the future of work.

## Problem

Enterprise software is broken. Workers waste time on inefficient workflows. There is too much information and not enough insight. Companies struggle to be productive in today's fast-paced world.

## Solution

We are building an AI-powered platform that uses advanced AI to streamline workflows and unlock productivity. Our proprietary AI model will be the best in the world. We will use blockchain where appropriate. The platform scales horizontally to billions of users with no bottleneck.

We are building a moat through speed of execution and team quality.

## Market

The global software market is enormous and growing.

TAM: **$15 trillion** — this is the total global enterprise + consumer software opportunity, plus AI, plus the metaverse.

SAM: **$3 trillion** — the portion we can serve with our AI-first approach.

SOM: **$900 billion (Year 2)** — we will capture 30% of SAM in year 2 with our viral go-to-market.

## Business Model

Freemium SaaS. Pricing TBD post-PMF. We will figure out monetization once we have scale.

We expect strong unit economics.

## Traction

We have 100,000 signups for our waitlist. Several large enterprises have expressed interest. Our LinkedIn post went viral.

## Team

- **Alex Founder, CEO** — visionary leader with experience at multiple companies. Knows AI deeply.
- **Jordan Cofounder, CTO** — technical genius. Has worked on machine learning. Will hire a team to build the product.

## Financials

Year 1: We will hit $100M ARR.
Year 2: We will hit $1B ARR.
Year 3: $10B ARR with profitability.

The hockey stick is clear. Once we crack PMF, growth will be exponential.

We are raising $50M at a $500M post-money valuation to fund the build-out.
